languages.text: "В высшем приоритете извещаю Лорд-капитана о том, что священный археотех все еще находится в агональном состоянии, вызванном вредительскими действиями бунтовщиков. Функциональность Сектора Бионика ограничена. Жизнеформа "генетор маджорис Ферренц" смиренно ожидает вашего содействия в санации реликварного механизма".

"With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."
languages.original_text: "В высшем приоритете извещаю Лорд-капитана о том, что священный археотех все еще находится в агональном состоянии, вызванном вредительскими действиями бунтовщиков. Функциональность Сектора Бионика ограничена. Жизнеформа "генетор маджорис Ферренц" смиренно ожидает вашего содействия в санации реликварного механизма".

The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

"With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

languages.text: “以最高优先级向舰长大人汇报以下消息：这件神圣远古科技因叛军恶意破坏，目前仍处于濒死状态。仿生区的功能受到限制。‘高级基因士费伦茨’生命体正谦卑地等待您的协助，净化这件圣物机械。”
languages.original_text: "With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

traits.locale_text: “以最高优先级向舰长大人汇报以下消息：这件神圣远古科技因叛军恶意破坏，目前仍处于濒死状态。仿生区的功能受到限制。‘高级基因士费伦茨’生命体正谦卑地等待您的协助，净化这件圣物机械。”

languages.text: «Con la máxima prioridad, notifico {mf|al|a la} Lord Capitán que la sagrada arqueotecnología sigue padeciendo una agonía constante provocada por la malicia deliberada de los rebeldes. La operatividad del Sector Bionica está limitada. La forma de vida "genetor majoris Ferrenz" aguarda humildemente su asistencia en la purificación del mecanismo del relicario».
languages.original_text: "With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

traits.locale_text: «Con la máxima prioridad, notifico {mf|al|a la} Lord Capitán que la sagrada arqueotecnología sigue padeciendo una agonía constante provocada por la malicia deliberada de los rebeldes. La operatividad del Sector Bionica está limitada. La forma de vida "genetor majoris Ferrenz" aguarda humildemente su asistencia en la purificación del mecanismo del relicario».

languages.text: « Information de la plus haute importance pour {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} : l'archéotechnologie sacrée est toujours à l'agonie en raison des actions malveillantes des rebelles. Le fonctionnement du secteur Bionica est limité. L'entité genetor majoris Ferrenz attend humblement votre aide pour purifier le mécanisme de la relique. »
languages.original_text: "With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

traits.locale_text: « Information de la plus haute importance pour {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} : l'archéotechnologie sacrée est toujours à l'agonie en raison des actions malveillantes des rebelles. Le fonctionnement du secteur Bionica est limité. L'entité genetor majoris Ferrenz attend humblement votre aide pour purifier le mécanisme de la relique. »

languages.text: "Mit höchster Priorität informiere ich den Lord Captain, dass sich die heilige Archäotech aufgrund der mutwilligen Taten der Rebellen noch immer in einem agonalen Zustand befindet. Die Funktionalität von Sektor Bionica ist eingeschränkt. Die Lebensform 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' erwartet demütig Eure Unterstützung bei der Reinigung des Reliquiarmechanismus."
languages.original_text: "With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

traits.locale_text: "Mit höchster Priorität informiere ich den Lord Captain, dass sich die heilige Archäotech aufgrund der mutwilligen Taten der Rebellen noch immer in einem agonalen Zustand befindet. Die Funktionalität von Sektor Bionica ist eingeschränkt. Die Lebensform 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' erwartet demütig Eure Unterstützung bei der Reinigung des Reliquiarmechanismus."

languages.text: "En yüksek öncelikle, kutsal arkeotekin isyancıların kötü niyetli eylemleri nedeniyle hâlâ can çekişmekte olduğunu Lord Kaptan'a bildiririm. Sektör Biyonika'nın işlevselliği sınırlıdır. 'Genetör Majoris Ferrenz' adlı yaşam formu, kutsal emanet mekanizmasının arındırılmasında yardımınızı alçakgönüllülükle bekliyor."
languages.original_text: "With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

traits.locale_text: "En yüksek öncelikle, kutsal arkeotekin isyancıların kötü niyetli eylemleri nedeniyle hâlâ can çekişmekte olduğunu Lord Kaptan'a bildiririm. Sektör Biyonika'nın işlevselliği sınırlıdır. 'Genetör Majoris Ferrenz' adlı yaşam formu, kutsal emanet mekanizmasının arındırılmasında yardımınızı alçakgönüllülükle bekliyor."

languages.text: 「最も優先事項として、聖なるアーケオテクノロジーは、反乱軍の悪意ある行為によって、未だに瀕死の状態にあることを、大隊長に報告いたします。セクター・ビオニカの機能は制限されています。生命体「ジェネトール・マジョリス・フェレンツ」は、聖遺物機構の浄化を貴方の支援を仰ぎます。」
languages.original_text: "With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."

traits.locale_text: 「最も優先事項として、聖なるアーケオテクノロジーは、反乱軍の悪意ある行為によって、未だに瀕死の状態にあることを、大隊長に報告いたします。セクター・ビオニカの機能は制限されています。生命体「ジェネトール・マジョリス・フェレンツ」は、聖遺物機構の浄化を貴方の支援を仰ぎます。」
